task_completion.description: Log into the SEB Server web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SEB Server login page at localhost:8080 or the dashboard immediately after logging in with super-admin/admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to create a new exam configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Create', 'Add', or 'New' button within the Exam Configurations section of the SEB Server interface.

task_completion.description: Set the exam configuration name to 'Distance Learning 101'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text 'Distance Learning 101' entered into the Name or Title field for the exam configuration.

task_completion.description: Enable the Chat feature for remote proctoring
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a checkbox, toggle, or setting for 'Chat' (likely under remote proctoring or features) in an enabled, checked, or 'On' state.
Screenshots show the value '10' entered into a field labeled 'Connection Retries', 'Retries', or similar within the proctoring/network settings.
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save' or 'Submit' button, followed by a success message or the new 'Distance Learning 101' configuration appearing in the list of saved configurations.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the SEB Server GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) navigating to http://localhost:8080, rather than API calls being made via terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to insert the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show curl commands, python scripts, or mysql/mariadb queries being used to bypass the web interface.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual SEB Server application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into actual input fields and clicking real buttons in the SEB Server UI, not just editing a text file or using browser developer tools to fake the visual state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exam configuration name is exactly 'Distance Learning 101'. The expected connection retries value is exactly '10'.
